name: Stickman Bridge Constructor
description: You like construction games and stickman games? This game is made for you ! Play as an heroic stickman worker that build bridge after brige. You now want to become the most famous Stickman Bridge Constructor Stickman Bridge Constructor is a fun game easy to play... but dificult to master
instructions: Touch the screen to build the perfect size bridge not to long not to short If your bridge is too long your stickman fall If your bridge is too short your stickman fall How far do you think you can go
